sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12082" key="a)ph/rinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπήρῑνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πηρίν</etym>) <sense id="n12082.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without scrotum,</tr_> restored (for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀπύρηνος</foreign>) by Coraeës in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archestr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
